title: DexMasters [Cobblemon]
description: Fabric modpack for the DexMasters Cobblemon server.
body:
## What is this?:

Contained on this page is the fabric modpack for the DexMasters Cobblemon server. It contains a large selection of quality-of-life and performance mods as well as a handful of other feature mods added to taste. Provided to you on Modrinth for easy access and updating from any launcher that can download Modrinth-hosted modpacks. We recommend the [Modrinth App](https://modrinth.com), but it's up to you!

**It is recommended to run this modpack with at least 3-4GB of allocated RAM. You can change this by doing the following steps:**

1. Download and select the Modpack.
2. Click "Options" on the left.
3. Find "Java memory" under the "Java" section.
4. Check "Override global memory settings"
5. Find the text box to the right of the slider.
6. Type in "3072" for 3GB, or a higher for more.
7. Play the Modpack and log onto DexMasters!

(For your reference: 1GB = 1024MB)

![Divider](https://i.imgur.com/jR9VIAS.png) 

### Most notable features:

_Some features may not be completely available unless connected to the DexMasters server!_

- **Become your favorite type!**
  - We have utilized the Origins mod to provide custom type-based origins. Embody your favorite type and gain various buffs, debuffs, and abilities themed around that type! Like the Dragon type? Gain permanent elytra and use Draco Meteor to shoot fireballs at will, but exhaust hunger more quickly! What about Fire type? You can shoot an arrow Flamethrower and use Burn Up to set yourself on fire to gain temporary buffs! Normal type is your effective opt-out of this feature, containing no buffs, debuffs, or abilities.
- **Protect your land from unsavory individuals!**
  - Open Parties and Claims is a fantastic tool to protect and share your land. You can claim entire chunks straight from Xaero's Minimap(included) and also see any claim from there as well. Diverse flag control lets you tweak your protection exactly how you want it.
- **More to cook, more to eat!**
  - Expand your diet with Farmer's Delight & Add-ons. Bake a Coffee Cake, brew some tea, share a pot roast with your friends, and much more!
- **Extra blocks and decor!**
  - Included in this pack is the full suite of Macaw's Mods alongside Handcrafted and more to provide you with much more options for building your home and decorating your landscape!
- **Talk to the community in-game!**
  - We have added Simple Voice Chat to this modpack to allow to you participate in opt-in proximity voice chat on our server. This is entirely optional and is disabled by default until you press N to unmute other people. This does not unmute you, however, which is a separate keybind(M). Others will be able to see if you have this disabled to avoid confusion.
- **Express yourself!**
  - Using the Emotecraft mod will let you show just a bit more emotion when interacting with other players. The server provides a base list of emotes for you to use, but you are free to upload your own to your client that others will be able to see with no input on their end. 

*We are always looking to improve or add more features based on user suggestion. This list is non-exhaustive and only references mods that are downloaded locally when installing the modpack.*

**This modpack and the associated server makes use of MegaShowdown x AllTheMons!**

![Divider](https://i.imgur.com/jR9VIAS.png)
